new_claims.claim_text: Prof. Francis Boyle found dead 20 days after agreeing to testify against Bill Gates and Albert Bourla over alleged dangers of COVID-19 mRNA vaccines, implying foul play.
new_claims.notes: Conspiracy theory challenging public trust and evidence.

new_claims.claim_text: Christina Koch, an Artemis astronaut, is also an actress in Mad Max: Fury Road, implying space missions are staged.
new_claims.notes: Conspiracy theory undermining authenticity of events and institutions.

new_claims.claim_text: US Air Force KC-135 Stratotanker arrived at RAF Mildenhall with heavy shrapnel damage, with questions about its authenticity.
new_claims.notes: Potential disinformation or strategic narrative construction.
